assertions.title: URL State Management

steps.expected: Initial URL with no query params
steps.observed: http://localhost:8050/ — no query params (correct for initial load)
URL remains http://localhost:8050/ — era dropdown is State, not Input, in update_url_state callback so no URL update fires

URL remains http://localhost:8050/ — detail view did NOT open at all (AG Grid cellClicked/selectedRows callbacks not firing through Playwright clicks). Even if it had opened, the URL update would have been incomplete because era is State not Input.

steps.expected: Dashboard restores LongMemEval era and exp_lme_0008 detail view, URL preserved
steps.observed: Era and experiment ARE correctly restored (LongMemEval shown, exp_lme_0008 detail view open). However, dcc.Location strips query params on page load — URL becomes http://localhost:8050/ after loading.

steps.expected: Dashboard restores memories_500 era, URL preserved
steps.observed: Era correctly restored (button shows memories_500, only exp_* experiments visible). However, URL again stripped to http://localhost:8050/.

steps.action: Browser back from exp_lme_0008 detail view
steps.expected: Return to leaderboard with era preserved
steps.observed: Browser back does nothing visible — all history entries resolve to the same bare URL (http://localhost:8050/) so back/forward has no effect on view state

evidence.network: N/A — all testing was client-side state management

assertions.issues: URL state management broken in three ways as previously reported: (1) Era changes do not update URL — update_url_state callback has era as State not Input. (2) dcc.Location strips query params on page load — even though restore_from_url correctly reads the search string and restores view state, the URL bar always ends up bare. (3) Combined era+experiment URL state incomplete — even when both params are provided, the URL is immediately stripped. Browser back/forward is non-functional since all history entries resolve to the same bare URL.

frictions.description: AG Grid row/cell clicks via Playwright did not trigger Dash callbacks (cellClicked, selectedRows) — the detail view never opened through any click method (agent-browser click, JS click, synthetic event dispatch). This prevented testing the experiment-click URL update path, though the code review confirms it would be incomplete anyway due to era being State.
frictions.resolution: Worked around by navigating directly to URLs with query params to test the restoration side.

summary: VAL-TABLE-021 FAIL: URL state management has three distinct bugs. (1) Era filter changes never update the URL because update_url_state uses era as State not Input. (2) dcc.Location strips query params on page load, so even direct URL navigation with params (e.g., ?era=LongMemEval&experiment=exp_lme_0008) results in a bare URL after loading, even though view state is correctly restored. (3) Browser back/forward is non-functional since all history entries resolve to the same bare URL. The restore_from_url callback works correctly in reading params and restoring state, but the URL stripping prevents bookmarkability and shareability. Matches previously reported failure context from round 3.
